_note: Minimal, NetLogic-authored Wappalyzer-COMPATIBLE fingerprints (zero licensing risk). Drop in the open webappanalyzer (enthec) dataset at src/fusion/data/wappalyzer.json or set NETLOGIC_WAPPALYZER_DATA to use the full ~3,000-tech set; the loader prefers it over this minimal seed.
_schema: tech -> { cats, headers{name:pattern}, cookies{name:pattern}, html:[pattern], scriptSrc:[pattern], meta{name:pattern}, url:[pattern], implies:[tech] }. Pattern = regex with optional \;version:\1 and \;confidence:NN tags.
